headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -130.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 179% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 146 quotes and exceptionally high strong intensity (122 quotes) - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• While frustration scores dropped from yesterday's peak, they remain near the top of the historical range and well above typical levels.

• Fears surged dramatically from yesterday's low, while optimism stayed deeply negative with more mild-intensity quotes than usual.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
